title: [codereview-pass1] coap_status.c error code chunk: missing capacity fields in struct and encode
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.h and .c still lack txq_cap, fwd_cap fields per CCP-17 and previous j7lm/48l1. Encode does not report full capacity status. Return ENOBUFS is partial without it. Tag: codereview
